utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 of these items. Each item is fully specified: destination (Czech Republic), travel_dates (2024-06-13 to 2024-06-17), transportation (flight details and cost), accommodation (hotel details and cost), activities (details and cost), additional_services (details and cost), and total_budget (with total cost and currency). Therefore, all required items are present and fully detailed.

The accommodation is 'Artistic Abode hotel3', which directly matches 'Artistic Abode' with a rating of 6. The activities listed are 'City Walking Tour and Golf Day', corresponding directly to the 'City Walking Tour' (rating 8) and 'Golf Day' (rating 10). The additional services are 'None', which means there is no corresponding rated item. Therefore, the mapped items and their ratings are: Prague (6), Standard Airlines First Class (10), Artistic Abode (6), City Walking Tour (8), and Golf Day (10).
